positioning: I help B2B startups build predictable outbound and referral-driven pipeline without relying on paid ads.
outcome: Build a repeatable system for conversations with qualified startup buyers.

message_stages.connection: Short personalized request based on one visible fact; no pitch.
message_stages.accepted: Friendly non-pitch opener tied to their role or recent post.
message_stages.useful_followup: One useful observation or resource; no meeting request.
message_stages.diagnostic_invite: Invite to a short diagnostic call only after clear relevance or engagement.
message_stages.partner: Explain the referral fit, clean tracking, and 20% of the first three months after client payment clears.
